commands.description: Activate the QuantConnect Liquidate sequence: cancel resting IB orders, submit market liquidation, halt paper engines, disconnect IB Gateway. SRS trace: SRS-SAFE-001, SYS-44a, SYS-44b, NFR-P3. Contract only. Concrete handler behaviour lands with the downstream feature that owns the workflow (EXE-1, ORCH-1, RESV-1, LOG-1, NOTIF-1). Requires --confirm (UI-4 / SRS-SAFE-001 two-step modal).
commands.name: activate
commands.summary: Activate the QuantConnect Liquidate sequence: cancel resting IB orders, submit market liquidation, halt paper engines, disconnect IB Gateway.

arguments.name: --json
arguments.summary: Emit machine-readable JSON instead of formatted text.

commands.name: status

info.description: Operator CLI surface for the ATP single-user trading platform (API-4, traces SRS-API-001 and SRS-SAFE-001). Runs only under local shell access; no remote-CLI mode and no auth tokens — see SRS-SEC-002.
info.title: ATP Operator CLI
